items.title: GB women shock curling world champions Canada
items.description: Great Britain's women curlers kickstart their campaign with a superb first victory of the 2026 Winter Olympics, beating medal contenders Canada 7-6.

items.title: Guimaraes set to be out for two months with injury
items.description: Newcastle United captain Bruno Guimaraes is expected to be out for a couple of months after sustaining a hamstring injury.

items.title: 'I told him where to stick it' - Canada and Sweden in curling row
items.description: When the men's rinks of Canada and Sweden met at the Winter Olympics in Cortina on Friday, tempers became frayed.

items.title: William and Catherine all smiles in Valentine's Day photograph
items.description: The previously unseen photo was shared with the caption "Happy Valentine's Day" along with a heart emoji.

items.title: 'It all kicked off' Canada and Sweden curlers argue over 'double-tapping'
items.description: Sweden's Oskar Eriksson and Canada's Marc Kennedy exchange tense words after the Swedes accused the Canadian's of double-tapping their stones during t...
